message:
feat(fp-types): Timestamp floor_to/ceil_to/round_to (br-5h6n / 9p0u Phase 2.5)

Closes br-frankenpandas-5h6n. Adds Timedelta-unit rounding methods on Timestamp matching pandas .floor / .ceil / .round semantics.

- Timestamp::floor_to(unit_nanos) -> Timestamp: round down to nearest multiple via div_euclid (handles negative nanos correctly).
- Timestamp::ceil_to(unit_nanos) -> Timestamp: round up via floor + adjust on non-zero remainder; saturating_add on overflow.
- Timestamp::round_to(unit_nanos) -> Timestamp: banker's rounding (half-to-even on ties for even units; round-up for odd units where no true half exists). Saturating_mul on the chosen-multiple step.

NaT propagation + non-positive-unit rejection: any of (NaT input, unit_nanos == 0, unit_nanos < 0) returns NaT. Tz preserved on all three. Pure i64 nanos arithmetic — Phase 3 chrono_tz integration adds tz-aware DST-correct variants for date-aligned units.

11 new unit tests cover: floor down (12:34:56 → 12:00), already-aligned no-op, negative-nanos div_euclid correctness, ceil up (12:34:56 → 13:00), ceil no-op, round to nearest both directions, banker's tie-to-even (4 cases), zero/negative unit rejection, NaT propagation, tz preservation. Total fp-types test count: 142 (131 prior + 11 new), 24 timestamp_ tests.

rch: cargo test -p fp-types --lib timestamp_ (24 pass), cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean, cargo clippy -p fp-types --all-targets -D warnings clean, ubs exit 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
